user.title: Add a button mapping
user.description: Paste or edit the whole mapping as YAML — same shape as the examples. Set the trigger entity, mode, timeouts, and the action(s) for each gesture (single_click_action / double_click_action / long_press_action). Set fire_events: true to also emit button_actions_gesture events.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the YAML structure.

abort.already_configured: This trigger entity is already configured.

init.title: Edit button mapping
init.description: Edit the whole mapping as YAML. It is prefilled with the current configuration, so you can change timeouts/actions, copy it to another room, or change the trigger entity.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the YAML structure.
error.already_configured: Another mapping already uses this trigger entity.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Reload all YAML-configured Button Actions mappings without restarting Home Assistant.
